title: ASCII Art Generator
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a 100x100 ASCII art image of a cat, using only the characters '#', '.', and ' '. The prompt should be able to handle different viewports and generate the image in a compact format, with a maximum of 10KB size.
constraints: Must use only the characters '#', '.', and ' '
Must be able to handle different viewports

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated ASCII art image is visually appealing and matches the expected cat design
The generated image is compact and meets the 10KB size constraint
The prompt can generate the image for different viewports
